title: Satellite Analytics Workbench
description: A high-density data visualization tool featuring complex filtering logic and a master-detail selection area.

title: Through the Quiet Lens
description: A web-based visual novel exploring student stress and anxiety. Powered by a custom-built, data-driven narrative engine designed for extensible storytelling and branching paths.
full_description: Through the Quiet Lens is a web-based visual novel game that explores a theme of mental health with respect to college student stress and anxiety. The storyline narrative allows the player to choose-their-own-adventure by selecting choices to the story's scenarios. Designed with all original art and an easy and intuitive user experience, the gameplay is easy and balances storytelling and visual aesthetics. Featuring a data-driven and extensible narrative engine, the concept can be reused for new storylines catering to a large range of demographics. The richly emotional and introspective journey is grounded in relatable experiences and offers practical and insightful outcomes.
features: Branching dialogue and state-based story paths
Original character design and digital assets

writing_process.title: The process of writing the story:
writing_process.content: The story writing was really the "main" part of this project, going through multiple iterations, edits, changes, etc. Many parts of the story were written, re-written, changed, as I got a feel for how the narrative should go and how I wanted Sage's story to conclude. Writing out different choices, different paths, different coping strategies—so much time and research went into the narrative to make it feel truly relatable, but also truly real.
writing_process.link_text: See my living script Google Doc.

drawing_process.title: The process of drawing Sage:
drawing_process.description: All my drawings were done on my iPad using the software MediBang. Below is the drawing process for Variant 1 (Main) of Sage, from line-art to completion.
